---
title: Formulez votre demande
page-layout: custom
airtable: "https://airtable.com/embed/appWo7CiUOiuLDn8Y/pag6Qf3m75x7RkMKj/form"
---

::: {.page-content style="gap: 3rem;"}

::: {.column width="40%"}

# titre

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

:::

::: {.column .embed-container width="60%"}
<iframe
  class="embed-form"
  src="{{< meta airtable >}}"
  title="Formulaire de demande d'aide méthodologique"
  loading="lazy"
  width="100%"
  sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups"
  onload="this.classList.add('loaded')">
</iframe>
:::

:::
